zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexandre Gaillard於1450年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Mathurin Gaillard II30歲，母親Jeanne de Callipeaux20歲。他於大約1470年與Jeanne Delange在法國皮卡迪奧易可雷希結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1510年10月24日在法國皮卡迪索姆可雷希--朋提額享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexandre Gaillard于1450年出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，他的父亲Mathurin Gaillard II30岁，母亲Jeanne de Callipeaux20岁。他于大约1470年与Jeanne Delange在法国皮卡迪奧易可雷希结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1510年10月24日在法国皮卡迪索姆可雷希--朋提額享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gaillard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Philippe, Pierre, Andre, Andree, Ketly, Marcel, Mirlande, Monique.
French: nickname from gaillard ‘vigorous, strong’ (ultimately from Celtic galia ‘strength’). This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Gailhard, composed of the elements gail ‘powerful, lusty, cheerful’ + hard ‘hard, strong’.

variants.name: Gailliard
meanings: French: variant of   Gaillard   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Gaylord
meanings: English (southern, of Norman origin): variant of Gaylard altered by folk etymology, from the Old French and Middle English personal name Gaillart, Gallard, Galliard, representing either the ancient Germanic personal name Gailhard (composed of elements meaning ‘powerful, lusty, cheerful’ + ‘hard, firm, resilient, strong’) or Old French gaillard, gaillart ‘vigorous, powerful, strong’. Alternatively, from Middle English gaillard, galiard ‘brave, strong, valiant’, also ‘lively, gay, gaily dressed’.
Altered form of Gaylard, itself an Anglicized form of French Gaillard , which was brought to England by the Huguenots.
In some cases also an Americanized form of French   Gaillard  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexandre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexandre Gaillard was born in 1450, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, his father, Mathurin Gaillard II, was 30 and his mother, Jeanne de Callipeaux, was 20. He married Jeanne Delange about 1470, in Crécy, Oise, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 24 October 1510, in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexandre Gaillard est né en 1450, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Mathurin Gaillard II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Callipeaux, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne Delange environ 1470, à Crécy, Oise, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 24 octobre 1510, à Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexandre Gaillard 1450 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mathurin Gaillard II 30 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Callipeaux 20. Er hat um 1470 in Crécy, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich Jeanne Delange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 24. Oktober 1510 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexandre Gaillard è nato il nel 1450 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Mathurin Gaillard II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Callipeaux, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne Delange circa 1470, nel Crécy, Oise, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 24 ottobre 1510, nel Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexandre Gaillardが1450年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Mathurin Gaillard IIは30歳，母Jeanne de Callipeauxは20歳であった。約1470年にフランスピカーディオイゼクルeシでJeanne Delangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1510年10月24日にフランスピカーディソンメクルeシ-エン-プオンスイエウで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexandre Gaillard(이)가 1450년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mathurin Gaillard II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Callipeaux(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1470년 프랑스 피카디 이스 크e시에서 Jeanne Delange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1510년 10월 24일 프랑스 피카디 솜 크e시--폰스이외에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexandre Gaillard nasceu em 1450, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Mathurin Gaillard II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Callipeaux, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne Delange aproximadamente 1470, em Crécy, Oise, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1510, em Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, França, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexandre Gaillard родился в 1450 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Mathurin Gaillard II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Callipeaux, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne Delange около 1470 г. в местности крeси, оис, пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 24 октября 1510 г. в местности крeси-ен-понтиеу, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexandre Gaillard nació en 1450, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Mathurin Gaillard II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Callipeaux, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Jeanne Delange aproximadamente 1470, en Crécy, Oise, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1510, en Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 60 años.
